case_title: SERVING SENIORS CARE, LLC VS. BRENDA LEUS

docket_entries.description: AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR OF RAQUEL HECK FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERVING SENIORS CARE, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF SERVING SENIORS CARE, LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY RAQUEL HECK MANAGING DIRECTOR. DEFENDANT BRENDA LEUS NOT IS PRESENT HOWEVER SHE CALLED IN AND JUDGE ROBERTSON ALLOWED HER TO BE HEARD. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS WERE THE CONTRACT THAT THE DEFENDANT HAD SEEN AND HAD SIGNED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUANCE ORDER. SENT TO: PLAINTIFF - SERVING SENIORS CARE, LLC ; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERVING SENIORS CARE, LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $NOT STATED SERVED OCT-28-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEUS, BRENDA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SERVING SENIORS CARE, LLC
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-03-2020 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SERVING SENIORS CARE, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEUS, BRENDA $2,822.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,872.00, BILL IS FOR 67 HOURS AT $32 PER HOUR TOTAL $2144. LATE CHARGE OF 20% PURSUANT TO PARAGRAPH X. $428 PLUS ATTORNEY FEES $250 PURSUANT TO PARAGRAPH VI. TOTAL $2822. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,551.40 FILED BY SERVING SENIORS CARE, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT LEUS, BRENDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-20-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SERVING SENIORS CARE, LLC IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BRENDA LEUS IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE FILED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
